name: JP Metadata Sanitizer
description: Scan payment metadata (x402/A2A/AtoA) for accidental exposure of personal information, contract details, credentials, or internal memos before transmission to external services.

status.note: This is a specification draft for market testing. Do not call this endpoint.

use_cases.description: Before executing x402/A2A/AtoA payment, scan metadata for sensitive content
Verify x402 payment metadata does not contain personal info, credentials, or internal memos
Detect sensitive Japanese business context (internal project names, negotiation details, etc.)
Identify and flag PII, credentials, internal context, contract information
Last safety check before metadata reaches payment facilitator or blockchain

constraints.note: This API only scans and classifies metadata. It does not execute, facilitate, provide advice, or retain data.

key_outputs.description: List of detected sensitive field names
Whether fields need masking or removal
Safe to send to payment metadata layer (REQUIRED FIELD)
Recommended action based on scan results

related_safety_apis.name: agent-security-gateway
related_safety_apis.role: Prompt injection and instruction safety check
related_safety_apis.note: Metadata Sanitizer can be implemented as extension or derivative of security-gateway

downstream_apis.name: JP Payment Evidence Guard
downstream_apis.role: Post-payment service delivery and evidence verification

optional_downstream.name: agent-memory-api
optional_downstream.role: Encrypted storage of sanitization results and audit trail

relationships.flow: JP Counterparty Check → JP Metadata Sanitizer → Payment execution → JP Payment Evidence Guard → agent-memory-api

warnings: Do not call this endpoint. It is not yet available.
This is a specification draft for market testing.
The API is planned, not live. No actual deployment exists.
Metadata is scanned only - not stored, modified, or transmitted externally.
This API does not provide legal advice or compliance judgment.
Flagged metadata requires human decision before payment proceeds.
Use this API for detection and safety classification only.

option_b.name: Security Gateway Extension
option_b.description: Integrated into agent-security-gateway as metadata scanning module

option_c.name: Payment Middleware
option_c.description: Transparent middleware in x402 payment processing pipeline

v0_2_roadmap: AI-based anomaly detection for metadata patterns
